name: mermaid-research-pipeline
description: The design research pipeline for Mermaid Chart. Five skills wrapping Great Question, Slack, Jira, Notion, GitHub, Drive, and Figma — run an unmoderated test in 10 minutes, draft a new flow, synthesize results, surface prior research at sprint start (now writes an R-OPS-G discovery doc and asks before posting), and check what's in flight.
